title: TestLab UX: Start menu direction, Stop confirmation, fake StepDetail data
description:
UX review findings batch 3:
1. Start dropdown opens upward (bottom:100%), gets clipped at viewport top — change to downward
2. Stop button has no confirmation — accidental click kills long-running loop session
3. StepDetailPanel pre-flight shows hardcoded fake data ('Checked','OK') — remove until real data available
4. Loop interval hardcoded to 5m/15m only — add custom option or more presets
